SEARCH
Package com.example.cmput301_app.model

Class Notification

java.lang.Object
com.example.cmput301_app.model.Notification
public class Notification extends Object
Represents a notification in the application. A notification is sent to one or more entrants and is associated with a specific event. Notifications can be sent automatically by the system as a result of lottery draws, or manually by an organizer as a broadcast message to a group of entrants. This class handles only the local state of a notification. All persistence to Firebase is handled by NotificationDB. Outstanding issues: - Actual push notification delivery via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) is not yet implemented. This class models the notification data only.

    Enum representing the type of notification being sent.

  • Constructor Details

    • Notification

      public Notification()
      Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.

    • Notification

      public Notification(String notificationId, String eventId, String organizerId, String message, Notification.NotificationType type, com.google.firebase.Timestamp timestamp)
      Constructs a Notification with all required fields.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the unique identifier for this notification
      eventId - the ID of the event this notification is associated with
      organizerId - the device ID of the organizer who sent this notification
      message - the content of the notification message
      type - the type of this notification
      timestamp - the time this notification was sent

  • Method Details

    • addRecipient

      public void addRecipient(String deviceId)
      Adds an entrant to the recipient list. Does nothing if the entrant is already a recipient.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to add

    • removeRecipient

      public void removeRecipient(String deviceId)
      Removes an entrant from the recipient list. Does nothing if the entrant is not a recipient.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to remove

    • hasRecipient

      public boolean hasRecipient(String deviceId)
      Returns whether a given entrant is a recipient of this notification.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device ID of the entrant to check
      Returns:
      true if the entrant is a recipient, false otherwise

    • getNotificationId

      public String getNotificationId()
      Returns the unique identifier for this notification.
      Returns:
      the notification ID string

    • setNotificationId

      public void setNotificationId(String notificationId)
      Sets the unique identifier for this notification.
      Parameters:
      notificationId - the notification ID to assign

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the ID of the event this notification is associated with.
      Returns:
      the event ID string

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Sets the ID of the event this notification is associated with.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the event ID to assign

    • getOrganizerId

      public String getOrganizerId()
      Returns the device ID of the organizer who sent this notification.
      Returns:
      the organizer device ID string

    • setOrganizerId

      public void setOrganizerId(String organizerId)
      Sets the device ID of the organizer who sent this notification.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - the organizer device ID to assign

    • getRecipientIds

      public List<String> getRecipientIds()
      Returns the list of device IDs of entrants this notification was sent to.
      Returns:
      list of recipient device IDs

    • setRecipientIds

      public void setRecipientIds(List<String> recipientIds)
      Sets the list of device IDs of entrants this notification was sent to.
      Parameters:
      recipientIds - the list of recipient device IDs to assign

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the content of the notification message.
      Returns:
      the message string

    • setMessage

      public void setMessage(String message)
      Sets the content of the notification message.
      Parameters:
      message - the message string to assign

    • getType

      public Notification.NotificationType getType()
      Returns the type of this notification.
      Returns:
      the NotificationType enum value

    • setType

      public void setType(Notification.NotificationType type)
      Sets the type of this notification.
      Parameters:
      type - the NotificationType enum value to assign

    • getTimestamp

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getTimestamp()
      Returns the timestamp when this notification was sent.
      Returns:
      the Timestamp of when the notification was sent

    • setTimestamp

      public void setTimestamp(com.google.firebase.Timestamp timestamp)
      Sets the timestamp when this notification was sent.
      Parameters:
